tasks.title: Consolidate /api/offers/* and /api/offers/cnft/* into unified /api/offers endpoint
tasks.description: Merge the separate /api/offers/* and /api/offers/cnft/* endpoints into a single /api/offers endpoint. Move asset type detection logic (NFT vs cNFT) to the backend service layer so the API consumer doesn't need to know which endpoint to call. The backend should automatically determine the asset type and route to appropriate handlers.

tasks.title: Consolidate /api/offers/bulk into unified /api/offers endpoint
tasks.description: Merge /api/offers/bulk endpoint into the main /api/offers endpoint. The backend should automatically detect bulk vs single swaps based on the number of assets provided and route to the appropriate transaction builder (single tx vs Jito bundle). Remove the need for API consumers to explicitly choose between bulk and single endpoints.

tasks.title: Remove Admin Recovery endpoints from Swagger docs and convert to internal monitoring jobs
tasks.description: Remove Admin Recovery endpoints from public Swagger documentation. These should not be exposed as API endpoints - convert recovery operations to internal monitoring jobs that run automatically. Evaluate whether these endpoints should exist at all or be replaced with scheduled background jobs for recovery detection and handling.

tasks.title: Remove Swap Status endpoint section from API documentation
tasks.description: Remove the Swap Status endpoint section from Swagger/API documentation as it doesn't make sense in the current context. Review whether this endpoint is still needed or should be deprecated/removed entirely.

tasks.title: Review and fix API documentation for correctness
tasks.description:
Review and correct the API documentation (/docs) for accuracy. Key fixes needed:

1. **Fee Payment (WRONG)**: Docs say "50% split" - Actually taker pays by default (FeePayer.BUYER). The platform fee comes from whoever is sending SOL (taker if taker sends SOL, maker if maker sends SOL, maker for pure cNFT swaps).

2. **Expiry Times (WRONG)**: Docs say "5 minutes to 24 hours" - Actually with durable nonces: min 1 hour, max 30 days, default 7 days.

3. **Asset Limits (CORRECT)**: 10 per side is correct. Two-phase settlement is for resumable transactions, not larger batches. Keep at 10.

Review all other documentation sections for similar inaccuracies and fix them.

tasks.title: Fix cNFT <> cNFT swap failing with transaction too large error
tasks.description:
On production (https://api.easyescrow.ai/test), cNFT <> cNFT swaps are failing with error:
"Swap failed: Failed during accept: Transaction too large: 2220 > 1232"

**Issue:** The system appears to be attempting an atomic swap (single transaction) instead of detecting cNFTs and routing to two-phase settlement.

**Expected behavior:** When cNFTs are detected, the logic should automatically use two-phase settlement (delegation-based) which splits the operation into multiple smaller transactions.

**Environment notes:**
- JITO env flag is FALSE on production
- Two-phase settlement should be the active path for cNFT swaps

**Investigation needed:**
1. Check why cNFT detection is not triggering two-phase flow
2. Verify the routing logic in offerManager/transactionBuilder
3. Confirm JITO_ENABLED flag is being read correctly
4. Test the fix on staging before production deployment

tasks.title: Update test page UI improvements
tasks.description:
Update the test page at https://api.easyescrow.ai/test with the following changes:

1. **List Asset for Sale - Support all NFT types**: Currently only works for cNFT. Update to support any NFT type (SPL NFTs, cNFTs, etc.)

2. **Add NFT type filter**: Include a filter/dropdown to select NFT type when listing assets

3. **Remove "How it works" section**: Delete this section from the test page

4. **Add Settings title**: Add "Settings" as a title/header above the "🔑 Zero-Fee API Key (Optional)" section

File to modify: src/public/js/test-page.js and related HTML/CSS

metadata.description: API endpoint consolidation and simplification - merging offers endpoints and cleaning up docs
